title: Kofi and the Baby Animals
synopsis: Baby Kofi discovers adorable baby animals in the warm savanna, learning about zebras, elephants, and lions through gentle exploration and simple sounds.

pages.text: Kofi sees baby animals! Look, look!

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes pointing excitedly at various baby animals in golden savanna grass, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes in warm sunset colors
illustration.alt: Happy toddler Kofi pointing at baby animals in savanna

pages.text: Baby zebra says neigh! Black and white stripes.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes sitting near a small zebra foal, rendered in thick gouache brushstrokes with warm orange sunset lighting and textured golden grass
illustration.alt: Kofi with baby zebra in golden grass

pages.text: Baby elephant says trumpet! Big ears flap.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes watching a baby elephant with oversized ears, painted in bold confident gouache strokes with warm savanna colors and orange sunset glow
illustration.alt: Kofi observing baby elephant with big ears

pages.text: Baby lion says roar! Fluffy mane grows.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes near a lion cub with tiny fluffy mane, rendered in textured painterly gouache with thick brushstrokes in golden grass under orange sunset
illustration.alt: Kofi with baby lion cub in savanna

pages.text: Kofi loves baby animals! So soft and sweet.

illustration.description: Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes surrounded by all the baby animals - zebra, elephant, and lion - painted in warm gouache with expressive brushstrokes and golden sunset colors
illustration.alt: Kofi happy with all baby animals together

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What sound does the baby zebra make?
questions.explanation: The baby zebra says neigh, just like horses do!

questions.question: What is special about the baby elephant?
questions.explanation: The baby elephant has big ears that flap!

questions.question: What is growing on the baby lion?
questions.explanation: The baby lion has a fluffy mane that is growing!
